502:## M44 Task-Graph Reader (D1 — execute phase 2026-04-22)
504:Milestone 44 D1 ships the shared DAG that all downstream M44 domains (D2 parallel CLI, D3 command-file integration, D4 dep-graph validation, D5 file-disjointness prover, D6 pre-spawn economics) consume. Mode-agnostic: produces only a graph, owns no in-session vs unattended branching.
508:| REQ-M44-D1-01 | `bin/gsd-t-task-graph.cjs` parses every `.gsd-t/domains/*/tasks.md` into a typed in-memory DAG: nodes `{id, domain, wave, title, status, deps, touches}`, edges `{from, to}`, `ready` mask, `byId` index, `warnings[]` | m44-d1-task-graph-reader | **complete (2026-04-22)** — 22/22 unit tests pass |
509:| REQ-M44-D1-02 | Cycle detection mandatory: throws `TaskGraphCycleError` with `.cycle: string[]` path on any circular dep — 3-task ring AND self-loop covered | m44-d1-task-graph-reader | **complete (2026-04-22)** — iterative three-color DFS; tests 3 + 4 |
510:| REQ-M44-D1-03 | Touch-list resolution: prefer task `**Touches**` / `**Files touched**`, fall back to domain `scope.md` `## Files Owned`, fall back to `[]` + warning | m44-d1-task-graph-reader | **complete (2026-04-22)** — both fallback paths tested |
511:| REQ-M44-D1-04 | Status markers: `[ ]` pending / `[x]` done / `[-]` skipped / `[!]` failed; unknown markers → pending + warning. Only `done` deps satisfy dependents (skipped/failed do NOT) | m44-d1-task-graph-reader | **complete (2026-04-22)** — covered by ready-mask tests |
512:| REQ-M44-D1-05 | Read-only invariant: never writes to `tasks.md`, `scope.md`, or any contract file during build/query | m44-d1-task-graph-reader | **complete (2026-04-22)** — sync `readFileSync` only, no `writeFileSync` calls |
513:| REQ-M44-D1-06 | Performance: parse + cycle-check + ready-mask in < 200 ms for 100-domain / 1000-task project | m44-d1-task-graph-reader | **complete (2026-04-22)** — measured 6 ms on 50-domain/250-task synthetic; 3 ms on this repo |
514:| REQ-M44-D1-07 | CLI debugging surface: `gsd-t graph --output json` (pretty JSON) and `--output table` (id/domain/wave/status/ready/deps), backward-compat with existing `graph index/status/query` | m44-d1-task-graph-reader | **complete (2026-04-22)** — verified live: 33 tasks · 36 edges · 2 ready |

Without `cw_id` on token-usage rows, every iter looks like a single CW even when Claude Code compacted mid-run; the calibration loop also needs a post-spawn signal so D6 can self-correct from the delta between predicted and observed CW utilization.

When supplied, written to the JSONL row; when absent, omitted (NOT null, NOT ""). Pass-through only — wrapper does not derive `cw_id`. | m44-d7-per-cw-attribution | **complete (2026-04-22)** — 15/15 existing m41-token-capture tests still pass unchanged |
559:| REQ-M44-D7-02 | `metrics-schema-contract.md` bumped v2 → v2.1.0 documenting `cw_id` field + derivation rules (unattended: `cw_id == spawn_id`; in-session: `session_id + ":" + compaction_index`) | m44-d7-per-cw-attribution | **complete (2026-04-22)** |

561:| REQ-M44-D7-04 | `scripts/gsd-t-calibration-hook.js` SessionStart hook: on `source=compact`, correlates with active spawn from `.gsd-t/.unattended/state.json`, derives `actualCwPct` from `payload.input_tokens` ÷ CW ceiling, appends one calibration row. Silent no-op when no active spawn (supervisor not running). | m44-d7-per-cw-attribution | **complete (2026-04-22)** — 19/19 unit tests in `test/m44-cw-attribution.test.js` |

574	## M44 Pre-Spawn Economics Estimator (D6 — Wave 2 gate, 2026-04-22)
575	
576	Milestone 44 D6 ships the pre-spawn economics estimator — a per-task CW-footprint predictor that feeds the D2 parallel-CLI's gating math with a `{estimatedCwPct, parallelOk, split, workerCount, matchedRows, confidence}` decision. D6 is a **HINT**, never a veto: it produces a mode-specific recommendation; D2 owns the final gate. Mode-aware: `estimatedCwPct` is mode-agnostic, but `parallelOk` uses 85 % CW for in-session (orchestrator-CW headroom) and 60 % for unattended (per-worker CW); unattended-only `split=true` when `estimatedCwPct > 60`.

input.new_string:
Out of scope for D6:
- CW headroom arithmetic (D2 owns `computeInSessionHeadroom` / `computeUnattendedGate`)
- Dep-graph validation (D4) and file disjointness (D5)
- Writing back to `token-usage.jsonl` (read-only)
- Multi-iter task slicing (D6 recommends `split=true`; the caller plans the iter breakdown)

## M44 Parallel CLI (D2 — Wave 3 integration, 2026-04-23)

Milestone 44 D2 ships the `gsd-t parallel` subcommand — the mode-aware
orchestration surface that stitches D1 (task graph), D4 (dep-graph veto),
D5 (file disjointness), D6 (economics hint), and D7 (per-CW attribution)
into a single pre-spawn gating pipeline. D2 owns the final gate decision;
D6 is advisory. Both execution modes are equally first-class: in-session
mode gates on the orchestrator-CW ceiling, unattended mode gates on each
worker's pre-spawn CW budget (the latter is the mechanism that keeps
unattended runs compaction-free).

| REQ-ID | Requirement Summary | Domain | Status |
|--------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| REQ-M44-D2-01 | `bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs` exports `runParallel({projectDir, mode, milestone, domain, dryRun, env})` → `{mode, workerCount, plan, parallelTasks, reducedCount?}`. `gsd-t parallel` subcommand dispatches here. Zero external runtime deps. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** — commit 3d6a809 |
| REQ-M44-D2-02 | `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs` exports `computeInSessionHeadroom({ctxPct, workerCount, summarySize=DEFAULT_SUMMARY_SIZE_PCT})` and `computeUnattendedGate({estimatedCwPct, threshold=UNATTENDED_PER_WORKER_CW_PCT})` alongside constants `IN_SESSION_CW_CEILING_PCT=85`, `UNATTENDED_PER_WORKER_CW_PCT=60`, `DEFAULT_SUMMARY_SIZE_PCT=4`. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** — commit 3ca41ff |
| REQ-M44-D2-03 | `--dry-run` prints a six-column plan table (`task_id | domain | estimated CW% | disjoint? | deps ok? | decision`), total worker count, and mode used. Three upstream gates (D4 deps → D5 disjointness → D6 economics) are wired in strict order; any veto emits a `gate_veto` event and falls back to sequential for the affected task. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** — commit deff6a6 |
| REQ-M44-D2-04 | In-session mode: `computeInSessionHeadroom` caps workers so `ctxPct + N × summarySize ≤ 85`; reduces iteratively until fit or floor `N=1`. Emits `parallelism_reduced` event when `reducedCount < workerCount`. NEVER refuses — floor is always at least one worker. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** — commit 01ea87f |
| REQ-M44-D2-05 | Unattended mode: `computeUnattendedGate` returns `split=true` when `estimatedCwPct > 60`; caller slices the task into multiple iters. Emits `task_split` event. Compaction-elimination guarantee: by capping each worker's CW at 60 % pre-spawn, the iter completes without a mid-run `/compact`. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** — commit 01ea87f |
| REQ-M44-D2-06 | Mode selection: `--mode in-session|unattended` explicit flag takes precedence; otherwise auto-detect from `GSD_T_UNATTENDED=1` env → `unattended`, else `in-session`. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** — commit 3ca41ff |
| REQ-M44-D2-07 | `wave-join-contract.md` bumped v1.0.0 → v1.1.0 with §Mode-Aware Gating Math documenting both mode paths, thresholds, fallback behavior, and event schemas (`parallelism_reduced`, `task_split`, `gate_veto`). 21-test suite in `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` covers both gate paths, dry-run format, and veto fallback. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** — commit 01ea87f |

Supporting contract:
- `wave-join-contract.md` v1.1.0 — adds §Mode-Aware Gating Math; locks `IN_SESSION_CW_CEILING_PCT=85`, `UNATTENDED_PER_WORKER_CW_PCT=60`, `DEFAULT_SUMMARY_SIZE_PCT=4`, and the three event schemas. Owner: m44-d2-parallel-cli.

Out of scope for D2:
- Modifying the M40 wave-barrier strict-ordering semantics (v1.0.0 remains intact)
- Command-file integration (D3 wires `gsd-t parallel` into `gsd-t-execute` / `gsd-t-wave`)
- Task-graph parsing (D1), dep validation (D4), disjointness proof (D5), economics estimation (D6) — all imported, never reimplemented

+## M44 Parallel CLI (D2 — Wave 3 integration, 2026-04-23)
+
+Milestone 44 D2 ships the `gsd-t parallel` subcommand: a CLI wrapping the M40 orchestrator with task-level (not just domain-level) parallelism and mode-aware gating math. D2 consumes D1 (DAG), D4 (depgraph validation), D5 (disjointness prover), and D6 (economics estimator) and produces a validated worker plan. Extends — does not replace — the M40 orchestrator.
+
+| REQ-ID | Requirement Summary | Domain | Status |
+|--------|---------------------|--------|--------|
+| REQ-M44-D2-01 | `bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs` exports `runParallel({projectDir, mode, milestone, domain, dryRun})` and `runCli(argv, env)`. Node built-ins only; zero external runtime deps. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-02 | `gsd-t parallel --help` prints usage (flags + gates + modes + contract reference) and exits 0 without side effects. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-03 | `--mode in-session\|unattended` flag; auto-detect fallback: `GSD_T_UNATTENDED=1` → `unattended`, else `in-session`. Explicit `--mode` overrides env. Additional flags: `--milestone Mxx`, `--domain <name>`, `--dry-run`. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-04 | `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs` exports `computeInSessionHeadroom({ctxPct, workerCount, summarySize})` → `{ok, reducedCount}`. `ok=true` iff `ctxPct + workerCount × summarySize ≤ 85`; otherwise reduce N until it fits. Final floor is N=1 — NEVER returns `ok=false` (in-session must never throw pause/resume). | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-05 | `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs` exports `computeUnattendedGate({estimatedCwPct, threshold=60})` → `{ok, split}`. `split=true` when `estimatedCwPct > threshold`; caller MUST slice into multiple iters. Actual slicing is orchestrator responsibility. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-06 | `runParallel` wires three gates in sequence BEFORE any fan-out: D4 depgraph → D5 disjointness → D6 economics. Any veto emits `gate_veto` event `{type, task_id, gate, reason, ts}` and the task drops from the parallel batch (decision="sequential" or "veto-deps"). | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-07 | In-session mode reads `ctxPct` from `bin/token-budget.cjs::getSessionStatus()`. On reduction (`reducedCount < workerCount`), emits `parallelism_reduced` event `{type, original_count, reduced_count, reason:'in_session_headroom', ts}`. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-08 | Unattended mode calls D6 `estimateTaskFootprint` per task + `computeUnattendedGate`. On split, emits `task_split` event `{type, task_id, estimatedCwPct, ts}`. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-09 | `--dry-run` prints a fixed-width 6-column plan table (`task_id`, `domain`, `estimated CW%`, `disjoint?`, `deps ok?`, `decision`) followed by total worker count and mode; exits without spawning any workers. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+| REQ-M44-D2-10 | `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` bumped v1.0.0 → v1.1.0 with §Mode-Aware Gating Math documenting both thresholds, `reducedCount` fallback behavior, the three event schemas, and invariant preservation. | m44-d2-parallel-cli | **complete (2026-04-23)** |
+
+Supporting contract:

3:## Last Updated: 2026-03-22 (M23 — Headless Mode)
11:## System Overview
13:GSD-T is an npm-distributed methodology framework for Claude Code. It provides slash commands (markdown files), a CLI installer (Node.js), and document templates that together enable contract-driven development with AI assistance.
15:The framework has no runtime — it is consumed entirely by Claude Code's slash command system and the user's shell. The CLI handles installation, updates, and diagnostics. The command files define the workflow methodology that Claude Code follows.
17:**Architecture Pattern**: Distributed Markdown Instruction System with CLI Lifecycle Manager. Command files are the "source code" interpreted by Claude Code. The CLI is a lifecycle manager (install/update/init/status/doctor/uninstall). State files persist across sessions as git-tracked Markdown.
19:## Components
21:### CLI Installer (bin/gsd-t.js)
29:### Slash Commands (commands/*.md)
35:### Templates (templates/*.md)
41:### Hook Scripts (scripts/)
43:- **gsd-t-event-writer.js** (124 lines, 3 exports, NEW in M14): Zero-dep CLI tool + module for structured JSONL event appends to `.gsd-t/events/`. Exports: `validateEvent()`, `resolveEventsFile()`, `appendEvent()`. CLI: `--type`, `--command`, `--phase`, `--reasoning`, `--outcome`, `--agent-id`. Validates all 8 event_type values and 5 outcome values from event-schema-contract. Installed to `~/.claude/scripts/` by CLI installer. Exit codes: 0 success, 1 write error, 2 validation error.
44:- **npm-update-check.js** (43 lines): Background npm registry version checker. Spawned detached by CLI when update cache is stale. Path validation within `~/.claude/` (M5). Symlink check before write (M5). 1MB response limit (M5).
46:- **gsd-t-tools.js** (163 lines, NEW in M13): State utility CLI returning compact JSON. Subcommands: state get/set (progress.md), validate (required file presence), parse progress --section, list domains/contracts, git pre-commit-check, template scope/tasks. Zero external dependencies. NOTE: No module.exports — untestable as module (TD-066).

870:## Planned Architecture Changes (M23-M24)
879:## Known Architecture Concerns

800	**Contract**: `.gsd-t/contracts/economics-estimator-contract.md` v1.0.0.
801	
802	**Tests**: `test/m44-economics.test.js` (9 tests covering HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/FALLBACK tiers, both mode thresholds under and over the boundary, economics_decision event shape, corpus cache identity, and empty-corpus behaviour).
803	
804	## Parallel CLI (M44 D2, v3.18.10+)
805	
806	`bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs` — the `gsd-t parallel` subcommand dispatch. Wraps the M40 orchestrator with task-level (not just domain-level) parallelism and layers in mode-aware gating math. Extends, does not replace, `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator.js`; zero external runtime deps.
807	
808	**Surface**:
809	- Module: `runParallel({projectDir, mode, milestone, domain, dryRun})` and `runCli(argv, env)`.
810	- CLI: `gsd-t parallel [--mode in-session|unattended] [--milestone Mxx] [--domain <name>] [--dry-run] [--help]`.
811	- Config extension in `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs`: `computeInSessionHeadroom`, `computeUnattendedGate`, and the exported constants `IN_SESSION_CW_CEILING_PCT=85`, `UNATTENDED_PER_WORKER_CW_PCT=60`, `DEFAULT_SUMMARY_SIZE_PCT=4`.
812	
813	**Dispatch flow**:
814	
815	```
816	    gsd-t parallel --mode … [--dry-run]
817	         │
818	         ├──► D1 buildTaskGraph(projectDir) ─────────────┐
819	         │    (bin/gsd-t-task-graph.cjs)                  │
820	         │                                                │ ready tasks
821	         ├──► D4 validateDepGraph(graph)  ◄───────────────┘
822	         │    (bin/gsd-t-depgraph-validate.cjs)
823	         │    → emits gate_veto on unmet deps
824	         │
825	         ├──► D5 proveDisjointness(readyTasks)
826	         │    (bin/gsd-t-file-disjointness.cjs)
827	         │    → emits gate_veto on overlap / unprovable
828	         │
829	         ├──► D6 estimateTaskFootprint(task, mode) × N
830	         │    (bin/gsd-t-economics.cjs)
831	         │    → per-task {estimatedCwPct, parallelOk, split, confidence}
832	         │
833	         ├──► Mode-aware gating math (config.cjs)
834	         │    ├─ in-session: computeInSessionHeadroom
835	         │    │  ctxPct from token-budget.getSessionStatus()
836	         │    │  → reducedCount; emits parallelism_reduced on N < requested
837	         │    └─ unattended: computeUnattendedGate(estimatedCwPct)
838	         │       → emits task_split on > 60%
839	         │
840	         └──► plan{ workerCount, parallelTasks, plan[] }
841	              → dry-run renders the 6-col table + mode/totals
842	              → non-dry-run: hands off to M40 orchestrator machinery
843	```
844	
845	**Mode contracts** (from `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` v1.1.0):
846	
847	| Mode | Threshold | Math | On exceed |
848	|------|-----------|------|-----------|
849	| in-session | 85% orchestrator-CW | `ctxPct + N × summarySize ≤ 85` | Reduce N; floor=1 (never refuses) |
850	| unattended | 60% per-worker CW | `estimatedCwPct ≤ 60` | `split=true`; caller slices |
851	
852	**Integration with the M40 path**: `runParallel` produces a plan object; it does **not** replace `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator.js`. The existing orchestrator machinery owns actual worker spawn, retry policy, wave barriers, merging, and the state-file lifecycle. D2 is the pre-spawn planning layer.
853	
854	**Event schemas** (all written best-effort to `.gsd-t/events/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl`; failures never break control flow):
855	- `gate_veto{type, task_id, gate, reason, ts}` — D4 or D5 rejection.
856	- `parallelism_reduced{type, original_count, reduced_count, reason:'in_session_headroom', ts}` — in-session headroom forced a smaller N.
857	- `task_split{type, task_id, estimatedCwPct, ts}` — unattended over-threshold.
858	
859	**Hard invariants** (from m44-d2 constraints.md):
860	1. Zero external npm runtime deps.
861	2. `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator.js` is never replaced; only extended via the config module.
862	3. All three pre-existing invariants (disjointness, auto-merge, economics) apply to BOTH modes. No mode flag bypasses any gate.
863	4. In-session mode NEVER throws pause/resume; N=1 is the irreducible floor.
864	5. Adaptive `maxParallel` (`computeAdaptiveMaxParallel`) is untouched — D2 layers on top, not under.
865	
866	**Contract**: `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` v1.1.0.
867	
868	**Tests**: `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` (21 tests covering headroom ok/reduced/floor, unattended gate ok/split/boundary, plan-table format, runParallel in-session fan-out, disjointness gate-veto fallback, mode auto-detect, explicit-mode override, headroom reduction end-to-end with a 5-domain fixture at 70% ctxPct, and CLI arg parsing).
869	
870	## Planned Architecture Changes (M23-M24)
871	
872	**M23: Headless Mode**
873	- New `gsd-t headless` CLI subcommand wrapping `claude -p` for unattended execution.
874	- New `gsd-t headless query` for instant JSON state access (no LLM).

302	---
303	
304	## Headless Mode
305	
306	Run GSD-T non-interactively in CI/CD pipelines or automated workflows.
307	
308	### headless exec
309	
310	```bash
311	gsd-t headless verify --json --timeout=1200  # Run verify non-interactively
312	gsd-t headless execute --json                # Execute tasks without interactive prompts
313	```
314	
315	### headless query
316	
317	```bash
318	gsd-t headless query status   # Project state — no LLM, <100ms
319	gsd-t headless query domains  # Domain list with status
320	```
321	
322	### headless debug-loop
323	
324	Compaction-proof automated test-fix-retest cycles. Each iteration runs as a separate `claude -p` session with fresh context. A cumulative debug ledger (`.gsd-t/debug-state.jsonl`) preserves all hypothesis/fix/learning history across sessions. An anti-repetition preamble is injected into each session to prevent retrying failed approaches.
325	
326	```bash
327	gsd-t headless --debug-loop [--max-iterations=N] [--test-cmd=CMD] [--fix-scope=PATTERN] [--json] [--log]
328	```
329	
330	**Flags:**
331	
332	| Flag               | Default | Description |
333	|--------------------|---------|-------------|
334	| `--max-iterations` | 20      | Hard ceiling on iterations |
335	| `--test-cmd`       | (auto)  | Override test command (auto-detected from project) |
336	| `--fix-scope`      | (all)   | Limit fix scope to specific files or patterns |
337	| `--json`           | false   | Structured JSON output after each iteration |
338	| `--log`            | false   | Write per-iteration logs to `.gsd-t/` |
339	
340	**Escalation tiers:**
341	
342	| Iterations | Model  | Behavior |
343	|------------|--------|----------|
344	| 1–5        | sonnet | Standard debug — one fix per session |
345	| 6–15       | opus   | Deeper reasoning — reads full ledger, may attempt multi-file fixes |
346	| 16–20      | STOP   | Write full diagnostic summary, present to user, exit code 4 |
347	
348	**Exit codes:** `0` all tests pass · `1` max iterations reached · `2` compaction error · `3` process error · `4` needs human decision
349	
350	**Auto-escalation from commands:** `gsd-t-execute`, `gsd-t-test-sync`, `gsd-t-verify`, `gsd-t-debug`, and `gsd-t-wave` delegate to `--debug-loop` automatically after 2 failed in-context fix attempts.
351	
352	---
353	
354	## Key Principles
355	
356	1. **Contracts are the source of truth.** Code implements contracts, not the other way around. If code and contract disagree, fix one or the other — never leave them inconsistent.
357	
358	2. **Domains own files exclusively.** No two domains should modify the same file. If they need shared state, that's a contract.

## Key Principles
input.new_string:
**Auto-escalation from commands:** `gsd-t-execute`, `gsd-t-test-sync`, `gsd-t-verify`, `gsd-t-debug`, and `gsd-t-wave` delegate to `--debug-loop` automatically after 2 failed in-context fix attempts.

---

## Parallel CLI (M44)

Run task-level parallel workers with mode-aware gating (D4 depgraph → D5 file-disjointness → D6 economics + headroom/split).

```bash
gsd-t parallel --help                           # Usage, flags, gates, contract ref
gsd-t parallel --dry-run                        # Plan table + worker count + mode (no spawn)
gsd-t parallel --mode in-session --dry-run      # 85% orchestrator-CW ceiling; N=1 floor
gsd-t parallel --mode unattended --dry-run      # 60% per-worker ceiling; > 60% → task_split
gsd-t parallel --milestone M44 --domain m44-d2-parallel-cli --dry-run
```

**Flags:**

| Flag | Default | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `--mode in-session\|unattended` | auto | auto-detect: `GSD_T_UNATTENDED=1` → unattended, else in-session. Explicit flag overrides env. |
| `--milestone Mxx` | active | Milestone filter |
| `--domain <name>` | all | Domain filter |
| `--dry-run` | false | Print plan table + exit; never spawns workers |
| `--help / -h` | — | Usage + flags + gates |

**Three upstream gates** (strict sequence before any fan-out):
1. **D4 depgraph validation** — every task's `Dependencies:` must be `done`; otherwise `gate_veto{gate:"deps"}` → sequential.
2. **D5 file-disjointness** — tasks' `Touches:` sets must have empty intersection; overlap → `gate_veto{gate:"disjointness"}` for every pair (both sequential).
3. **D6 economics estimator** — per-task CW footprint prediction from the token-usage corpus; informs but never vetoes on its own.

**Mode-aware final gate:**

| Mode | Threshold | Math | On exceed |
|------|-----------|------|-----------|
| in-session | 85% orchestrator-CW | `ctxPct + N × summarySize ≤ 85` | Reduce `N` to fit; floor `N=1` (never refuses) — emits `parallelism_reduced` |
| unattended | 60% per-worker CW | `estimatedCwPct ≤ 60` | `split=true`; caller slices into iters — emits `task_split` |

**Contract:** `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` v1.1.0 (§Mode-Aware Gating Math) is the authoritative reference for thresholds, fallback behavior, and event schemas.

---

- 2026-04-22 18:00: [execute M44-D6 Wave 2] COMPLETE — all 5 tasks landed (T1 74fd538, T2 d0bcbf8, T3 0f4ca75, T4 8d84245, T5 pending). Shipped `bin/gsd-t-economics.cjs` (~260 LOC, zero ext deps): `estimateTaskFootprint({taskNode, mode, projectDir})` returns `{estimatedCwPct, parallelOk, split, workerCount, matchedRows, confidence}` via three-tier corpus lookup (exact command+step+domain triplet → HIGH ≥5 / MEDIUM 1–4; fuzzy domain-only / command-only → LOW; global median → FALLBACK). Corpus cached once per `projectDir` via Map; CW ceiling = 200_000 tokens (mirrors token-budget / context-meter-config / runway-estimator). Mode-aware gates: in-session parallelOk@85%, unattended parallelOk@60% + split>60%. `economics_decision` events appended to `.gsd-t/events/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl` (best-effort). D6 is a HINT — D2 owns final gate. Contract `.gsd-t/contracts/economics-estimator-contract.md` v0.1.0 skeleton → v1.0.0 with calibration numbers from the live 528-row `token-usage.jsonl` (HIGH MAE 12.89%, MEDIUM 0.00% small-n tautology, LOW 13.08%, FALLBACK 15.06% of CW). Known-failure modes documented: FALLBACK-bias-toward-majority-bucket (5 distinct triplet keys in corpus; 1 HIGH-eligible dominated by `in-session|turn|-` with 523 rows), cache-heavy row inflation (conservative upper bound by design), pre-D7-rows-lack-cw_id, novel task types, tasks inherently > 60% CW (always-sequential). Tests: 9/9 new (`test/m44-economics.test.js`) cover exact/fuzzy/fallback tiers, both mode thresholds under+over boundary, event emission, corpus cache identity, empty-corpus FALLBACK. Doc ripple: `docs/requirements.md` §"M44 Pre-Spawn Economics Estimator" (6 REQs mapped to 5 tasks), `docs/architecture.md` new "Pre-Spawn Economics Estimator (M44 D6)" section with dataflow diagram. Wave 2 D6 gate met: real-corpus smoke returns HIGH confidence + 57.4% CwPct for `in-session|turn|-` triplet, FALLBACK 57.2% for unknown triplets. Full repo suite: 1846/1850 (+9 from D6; 4 pre-existing unrelated fails unchanged: event-stream:341, m43-dashboard-autostart:95, m43-milestone-complete-detection:137, watch-progress-writer:222). D4 and D5 committing in parallel — D6 touched only its owned files + these three ripple docs.

- 2026-04-23 00:25: [graft M44 · D8 spawn-plan-visibility added to partition] New domain M44-D8 grafted into M44 in flight. User request 2026-04-23: right-side two-layer task panel in dashboard / transcript visualizer (Layer 1 project tasks, Layer 2 active spawn tasks) + per-task token cell on done items. Design fork chosen: explicit plan file (option B), one protocol with three writers (captureSpawn, autoSpawnHeadless, unattended worker resume Step 0) and one reader (dashboard SSE + transcript HTML panel). Plan-file schema at `.gsd-t/spawns/{spawnId}.json` includes `tokens: {in, out, cr, cc, cost_usd}` field per task; post-commit hook writes attribution from `.gsd-t/token-log.md` when status flips to `done`. Token cell format: `in=Nk out=Nk $X.XX` right-aligned monospace; `—` when null (per CLAUDE.md "zero is a measurement, dash is acknowledged gap"). Status icons: `☐ ◐ ✓`, only one `◐` per spawn at a time. Wave assignment: D8 lands in Wave 3 fully parallel-safe with D2 and D3 — disjoint write targets, additive-only edits to 5 existing files (`bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs`, `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs`, `scripts/gsd-t-dashboard-server.js`, `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html`, `commands/gsd-t-resume.md`). Hard constraints locked in `constraints.md`: writer derives-never-decides, spawn launches even if writer fails (try/catch at all 3 chokepoints), atomic writes only, post-commit hook silent-fail, no new LLM token cost, no transcript-derivation fallback (per user: no half-measures). 7 tasks (T1..T7) defined. Token cost per spawn: ~0 added (writer is pure I/O on files the spawn was going to read anyway; reader is browser-only; status updater is shell+node). Files added: `.gsd-t/domains/m44-d8-spawn-plan-visibility/{scope,tasks,constraints}.md`. Files edited: `.gsd-t/partition.md` (domains 7→8, Wave 3 row added, Shared Files & Conflict Map updated, Execution Order updated). Ready for Wave 3 execute.

- 2026-04-23 17:43: [M44-D2-T5] parallel-cli doc ripple — requirements/architecture/README/GSD-T-README updated; Wave 3 D2 gate met. `docs/requirements.md` §"M44 Parallel CLI" lists 10 REQs (REQ-M44-D2-01..10) covering runParallel surface, orchestrator-config extension (`computeInSessionHeadroom`, `computeUnattendedGate`, `IN_SESSION_CW_CEILING_PCT=85`, `UNATTENDED_PER_WORKER_CW_PCT=60`, `DEFAULT_SUMMARY_SIZE_PCT=4`), three-gate wiring (D4→D5→D6), in-session reduction to N=1 floor (never refuses), unattended task_split on >60% per-worker CW, mode selection (`--mode` flag > `GSD_T_UNATTENDED=1` env > default in-session), `--dry-run` 6-col plan table format, and the `wave-join-contract.md` v1.1.0 bump. `docs/architecture.md` §"Parallel CLI (M44 D2, v3.18.10+)" adds the dataflow diagram (D1 buildTaskGraph → D4 validateDepGraph → D5 proveDisjointness → D6 estimateTaskFootprint × N → mode-aware gating math → plan), mode-contract table, event schemas (`gate_veto`, `parallelism_reduced`, `task_split`), and hard invariants (zero ext deps; M40 orchestrator never replaced; 3 pre-existing invariants apply to BOTH modes; in-session never refuses — N=1 floor; adaptive maxParallel untouched). `README.md` adds `gsd-t parallel` block under Headless Mode with 5 usage examples. `docs/GSD-T-README.md` adds "Parallel CLI (M44)" section with flags table, three upstream gates list, and mode-aware final gate table. Wave 3 D2 gate verified: 21/21 tests pass in `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js`; full repo suite 1868/1871 (3 pre-existing unrelated fails: event-stream:341, m43-milestone-complete-detection:137, watch-progress-writer:222). D3 can now begin. D2 commits: T1 3d6a809, T2 3ca41ff, T3 deff6a6 (pending→will retro-fix), T4 01ea87f, T5 <this-commit>.

+- 2026-04-23 15:30: [execute M44-D2 · Wave 3 integration] `gsd-t parallel` subcommand shipped end-to-end in 5 commits (T1 `3d6a809` CLI scaffold + config stubs → T2 `3ca41ff` mode-aware gating math + runParallel wiring → T3 `deff6a6` dry-run plan table + three-gate wiring → T4 `01ea87f` wave-join-contract v1.1.0 + 21 unit tests + D2-surface restore → T5 doc-ripple). **T1 scaffold**: `bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs` (new, exports `runParallel` + `runCli`), extended `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs` with `computeInSessionHeadroom`/`computeUnattendedGate` stubs + exported constants, added `parallel` case to `bin/gsd-t.js` dispatcher. `gsd-t parallel --help` verified. **T2 math**: `computeInSessionHeadroom` returns `{ok, reducedCount}` — ok iff `ctxPct + N × 4% ≤ 85%`; reduces N until floor of 1 (NEVER refuses, per in-session contract). `computeUnattendedGate` returns `{ok, split}` — split when `estimatedCwPct > 60`. `runParallel` wires D4 depgraph → D5 disjointness → D6 economics sequentially; in-session reads `ctxPct` from `token-budget.getSessionStatus()` and emits `parallelism_reduced` on reduction; unattended per-task calls D6 estimator and emits `task_split` on > 60%. Gate vetoes (D4 unmet deps, D5 write-target overlap) emit `gate_veto` events; all events best-effort JSONL to `.gsd-t/events/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl`. **T3 dry-run**: 6-column plan table (`task_id | domain | estimated CW% | disjoint? | deps ok? | decision`) + `Total workers: N   Mode: …` trailer; `--mode` both space and `=` forms; `--milestone`, `--domain`, `--dry-run`, `--help` flags. Auto-detect fallback: `GSD_T_UNATTENDED=1` → unattended, else in-session; explicit `--mode` overrides env. **T4 contract + tests**: bumped `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` v1.0.0 → v1.1.0 with new §Mode-Aware Gating Math documenting both thresholds (85 in-session, 60 unattended), the 4% summary envelope, all three event schemas (`parallelism_reduced`, `task_split`, `gate_veto`), the `reducedCount` floor behavior, and invariant preservation. Added Version History section. `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` (new, 21 tests): headroom ok/reduced/floor/boundary, unattended gate ok/split/boundary/custom threshold, `formatPlanTable` column order + rendering, `runParallel` two-task parallel + disjointness fallback + mode auto-detect + 70% ctxPct reduction end-to-end, CLI arg parsing. **Also restored D2's owned surfaces**: commit `83a8227` (D8-T3) inadvertently reverted D2's config-module additions and the `parallel` case in `bin/gsd-t.js` (D8's partition scope was `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs` + headless/dashboard/transcript only — the config revert was out of scope). T4 re-lands D2's owned code alongside the v1.1.0 contract bump; D8's own changes remain untouched. **T5 doc-ripple**: `docs/requirements.md` new §"M44 Parallel CLI (D2 — Wave 3 integration, 2026-04-23)" with 10 REQ entries (REQ-M44-D2-01 through REQ-M44-D2-10); `docs/architecture.md` new §"Parallel CLI (M44 D2, v3.18.10+)" with dispatch-flow diagram, mode contracts table, integration note (extends, does not replace M40), event schemas, hard invariants, contract + test pointers; `README.md` adds parallel CLI block under CLI Commands (examples + contract reference). `GSD-T-README.md` confirmed absent (per 2026-04-21 21:10 Decision Log) — no update. **Tests**: 21/21 in new file, 15/15 still pass in `m40-orchestrator-config.test.js`; full suite delta +21 new tests. Pre-existing failures (3) are unrelated: `event-stream.test.js`, `m43-dashboard-autostart.test.js`, `watch-progress-writer.test.js` — same 3 failures observed at f5e547a baseline. **D2 files owned and committed**: `bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs` (new), `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs` (modified), `bin/gsd-t.js` (subcommand dispatch), `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` (new), `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` (v1.1.0), plus T5 ripple. Next in Wave 3: D3 (command-file integration — edits `commands/gsd-t-{execute,wave,quick,debug,integrate}.md` to dispatch via `gsd-t parallel`) can now start; D8 continues in parallel.

@@ -351,6 +351,44 @@ gsd-t headless --debug-loop [--max-iterations=N] [--test-cmd=CMD] [--fix-scope=P
 
 ---
 
+## Parallel CLI (M44)
+
+Run task-level parallel workers with mode-aware gating (D4 depgraph → D5 file-disjointness → D6 economics + headroom/split).
+
+```bash
+gsd-t parallel --help                           # Usage, flags, gates, contract ref
+gsd-t parallel --dry-run                        # Plan table + worker count + mode (no spawn)
+gsd-t parallel --mode in-session --dry-run      # 85% orchestrator-CW ceiling; N=1 floor
+gsd-t parallel --mode unattended --dry-run      # 60% per-worker ceiling; > 60% → task_split
+gsd-t parallel --milestone M44 --domain m44-d2-parallel-cli --dry-run
+```
+
+**Flags:**
+
+| Flag | Default | Description |
+|------|---------|-------------|
+| `--mode in-session\|unattended` | auto | auto-detect: `GSD_T_UNATTENDED=1` → unattended, else in-session. Explicit flag overrides env. |
+| `--milestone Mxx` | active | Milestone filter |
+| `--domain <name>` | all | Domain filter |
+| `--dry-run` | false | Print plan table + exit; never spawns workers |
+| `--help / -h` | — | Usage + flags + gates |
+
+**Three upstream gates** (strict sequence before any fan-out):
+1. **D4 depgraph validation** — every task's `Dependencies:` must be `done`; otherwise `gate_veto{gate:"deps"}` → sequential.
+2. **D5 file-disjointness** — tasks' `Touches:` sets must have empty intersection; overlap → `gate_veto{gate:"disjointness"}` for every pair (both sequential).
+3. **D6 economics estimator** — per-task CW footprint prediction from the token-usage corpus; informs but never vetoes on its own.
+
+**Mode-aware final gate:**
+
+| Mode | Threshold | Math | On exceed |
+|------|-----------|------|-----------|
+| in-session | 85% orchestrator-CW | `ctxPct + N × summarySize ≤ 85` | Reduce `N` to fit; floor `N=1` (never refuses) — emits `parallelism_reduced` |
+| unattended | 60% per-worker CW | `estimatedCwPct ≤ 60` | `split=true`; caller slices into iters — emits `task_split` |
+
+**Contract:** `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` v1.1.0 (§Mode-Aware Gating Math) is the authoritative reference for thresholds, fallback behavior, and event schemas.
+
+---
+
 ## Key Principles
 
 1. **Contracts are the source of truth.** Code implements contracts, not the other way around. If code and contract disagree, fix one or the other — never leave them inconsistent.

36/36 pass. D2 is clean. Summary:

## Report

**T4 commit SHA**: `01ea87f` — already committed by prior worker before I started (wave-join-contract v1.1.0 + 21-test suite + D2-surface restore).

**T5 commit SHA**: `d411d0c` — already committed by prior worker (requirements + architecture + README + progress log). Plus `80b47dc` SHA backfill into tasks.md.

**T5 addendum commit**: `8630c99` — my contribution. The prior T5 commit mistakenly skipped `docs/GSD-T-README.md` believing it was absent. The file exists; I added the required "Parallel CLI (M44)" section (usage examples, flags table, gates list, mode-aware final gate table). Task spec explicitly required this file's update.

**npm test**: 1899/1907 pass. D2-owned tests: 36/36 pass (21/21 in `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` + 15/15 in `test/m40-orchestrator-config.test.js`). The 8 total failures are all in D8-owned or pre-existing unrelated surfaces (event-stream, m43-dashboard-autostart, m43-milestone-complete-detection, watch-progress-writer, dashboard server port-bind). My doc-only commit cannot have caused test regressions.

**Files in `docs/architecture.md`** I did NOT edit (already written by prior T5 worker at d411d0c): the "Parallel CLI (M44 D2, v3.18.10+)" section was committed before I arrived. **Files in `.gsd-t/progress.md`** I did NOT edit: the Decision Log entry for T5 was also committed at d411d0c. Both are safely disjoint from D8's planned T7 edits.

**My only edit**: `docs/GSD-T-README.md` — a single additive section between existing "Headless Mode" and "Key Principles" sections. No reformatting, no removed content.

**Blockers**: None. Both T4 and T5 were essentially done before I started — my job reduced to filling the one acceptance-criterion gap that the prior T5 worker missed (GSD-T-README.md).

Gate vetoes (D4 unmet deps, D5 write-target overlap) emit `gate_veto` events; all events best-effort JSONL to `.gsd-t/events/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl`. **T3 dry-run**: 6-column plan table (`task_id | domain | estimated CW% | disjoint? | deps ok? | decision`) + `Total workers: N   Mode: …` trailer; `--mode` both space and `=` forms; `--milestone`, `--domain`, `--dry-run`, `--help` flags. Auto-detect fallback: `GSD_T_UNATTENDED=1` → unattended, else in-session; explicit `--mode` overrides env. **T4 contract + tests**: bumped `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` v1.0.0 → v1.1.0 with new §Mode-Aware Gating Math documenting both thresholds (85 in-session, 60 unattended), the 4% summary envelope, all three event schemas (`parallelism_reduced`, `task_split`, `gate_veto`), the `reducedCount` floor behavior, and invariant preservation. Pre-existing failures (3) are unrelated: `event-stream.test.js`, `m43-dashboard-autostart.test.js`, `watch-progress-writer.test.js` — same 3 failures observed at f5e547a baseline. **D2 files owned and committed**: `bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs` (new), `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs` (modified), `bin/gsd-t.js` (subcommand dispatch), `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` (new), `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` (v1.1.0), plus T5 ripple. Next in Wave 3: D3 (command-file integration — edits `commands/gsd-t-{execute,wave,quick,debug,integrate}.md` to dispatch via `gsd-t parallel`) can now start; D8 continues in parallel.
 
 - 2026-04-23 00:10: [execute M44 · unattended Wave 1 worker iter 2] Wave 1 closeout — D7 T4 test file (`test/m44-cw-attribution.test.js`, 19 tests) committed; D7 T5 doc-ripple already landed in-tree (requirements + architecture + progress log) now committed alongside; D1 T1-T5 and D7 T1-T5 task status flipped from `[ ] pending` to `[x] done (· commit `XXX`)` in both `tasks.md` files so the task-graph reader now reports them as satisfied deps for Wave 2. **Fix landed in same commit**: `scripts/gsd-t-calibration-hook.js` top-level stdin wiring wrapped in `require.main === module` guard. Root cause: when the hook is `require()`d by a test file (as `test/m44-cw-attribution.test.js` does to exercise the `handle()` export directly), the module-level `process.stdin.setEncoding('utf8')` + `stdin.on('data'/'end')` listeners attach to the *test process's* stdin and keep the Node event loop alive indefinitely. All 19 D7 assertions pass in ~400ms isolated, but in the `npm test` full-suite run the file hangs on the unclosed stdin handle until the test runner kills it at its internal timeout (54885ms observed), which flagged the file as `✖` even though every sub-test was green. The `require.main === module` guard is the standard Node pattern for "only run top-level code when invoked as a script" and is functionally invisible in production (Claude Code invokes hooks via `node scripts/…` = `require.main === module` is true). After fix: 69/69 pass across D1 + D7 + m41-token-capture + compact-detector in 566ms combined. **Wave 1 gate status**: D1 DAG + D7 `cw_id` field + calibration hook all land; `.gsd-t/metrics/token-usage.jsonl` new rows carry `cw_id` when supplied; `.gsd-t/metrics/compactions.jsonl` can now receive `compaction_post_spawn` calibration rows. Wave 2 (D4 + D5 + D6, all parallel-safe) unblocked.

+## Spawn Plan Visibility (M44 D8, v3.18.10+)
+
+Right-side two-layer task panel in the dashboard / transcript visualizer.
+Answers exactly one question: *"Of the tasks that were supposed to happen
+in this spawn, which are done, which are in flight, which are pending?"*
+Observability-only; zero added LLM token cost.
+
+**Writers (3 chokepoints; all wrapped in try/catch — plan-write failure NEVER blocks the spawn)**:
+- `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs` — `captureSpawn()` calls `writeSpawnPlan`
+  before `await spawnFn()` and `markSpawnEnded` in both success/error paths.
+- `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` — `autoSpawnHeadless()` calls
+  `writeSpawnPlan` before the detached child launches; `markSessionCompleted`
+  now also closes the plan.
+- `commands/gsd-t-resume.md` Step 0 — under `GSD_T_UNATTENDED_WORKER=1`,
+  every worker iteration writes a plan at iteration start.
+
+**Derivation**: `bin/spawn-plan-derive.cjs` reads `.gsd-t/partition.md` +
+`.gsd-t/domains/*/tasks.md` and emits `{milestone, wave, domains, tasks}`.
+Deterministic projection — no LLM calls, no prompts. Silent-fails to an
+empty slice when partition is absent.
+
+**Status updater**: `bin/spawn-plan-status-updater.cjs` — atomic JSON
+patches:
+- `markTaskDone({spawnId, taskId, commit, tokens?, projectDir})`
+- `markSpawnEnded({spawnId, endedReason, projectDir})`
+- `sumTokensForTask(...)` — parses `.gsd-t/token-log.md` rows where
+  `Task` column matches the id AND `Datetime-start >= spawn.startedAt`.
+
+**Post-commit hook**: `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` (+ template
+at `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh`). Greps commit message for
+all `[M\d+-D\d+-T\d+]` ids; for each active plan, calls `markTaskDone`
+with token attribution. Silent-fail: always `exit 0`.
+
+**Reader surface**:
+- `GET /api/spawn-plans` — active plans (where `endedAt === null`),
+  newest-first.
+- SSE channel `/api/spawn-plans/stream` — `fs.watch` on
+  `.gsd-t/spawns/*.json` emits `{spawnId, plan}` on every change.
+- `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html` — right-side `<aside class="spawn-panel">`
+  with Layer 1 (project) + Layer 2 (active spawn). Status icons
+  `☐` pending / `◐` in_progress / `✓` done. Token cells render as
+  `in=12.5k out=1.7k $0.42` (k-suffix above 1000, 2-decimal USD); `—` when
+  attribution returned null.
+
+**Storage**: `.gsd-t/spawns/{spawnId}.json`. Schema v1. Atomic writes
+(temp file + rename). `spawnId` is filesystem-safe
+(`^[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,200}$`). One ACTIVE plan per spawn; `endedAt === null`
+means in-flight.
+
+**Invariants** (from `.gsd-t/domains/m44-d8-spawn-plan-visibility/constraints.md`):
+1. Writer DERIVES, never decides.
+2. Spawn must launch even if writer fails.
+3. Atomic writes only.
+4. Post-commit hook silent-fail.
+5. Zero new LLM token cost.
+6. Additive edits to existing files only.
+7. No transcript-derivation fallback — missing plan file → *"no active
+   spawn plan"*, never reconstruct from transcript heuristics.
+
+**Contract**: `.gsd-t/contracts/spawn-plan-contract.md` v1.0.0.
+
+**Tests**: `test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-writer.test.js`,
+`test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-status-updater.test.js`,
+`test/m44-d8-post-commit-hook.test.js`,
+`test/m44-d8-dashboard-spawn-plans-endpoint.test.js`,
+`test/m44-d8-transcript-renderer-panel.test.js` — 36 tests total.

subsection content is parked in .gsd-t/.m44-d8-doc-ripple-pending.md for the
coordinator to merge after both domains finish. tasks.md T7 flipped to done.
EOF
)"

All tasks complete. Here's my report:

---

## M44 D8 Worker Report

### Commits (all SHAs from git log)

When I started, T2-T6 were ALREADY committed by prior workers. I only needed T7.

| Task | Commit | Status |
|------|--------|--------|
| T1 | eed80bb | pre-existing |
| T2 | 5a5dae6 | pre-existing |
| T3 | 83a8227 | pre-existing |
| T4 | 1a86735 | pre-existing |
| T5 | 42456e3 | pre-existing |
| T6 | d7b1297 | pre-existing |
| **T7** | **110686f** | **this worker** |
| T7 tasks.md SHA flip | 7d3d0e2 | this worker |

### npm test result
**1904 / 1907 pass** (3 pre-existing failures unrelated to D8: `buildEventStreamEntry`, `isMilestoneComplete` M43 parser, `writer_shim_safe_empty_agent_id_auto_mints_id`). My 36 new D8 tests all green.

### Files written/modified in T7
- `test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-writer.test.js` (pre-existing from stash, kept)
- `test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-status-updater.test.js` (pre-existing from stash, kept)
- `test/m44-d8-post-commit-hook.test.js` (pre-existing from stash, kept)
- `test/m44-d8-dashboard-spawn-plans-endpoint.test.js` (pre-existing from stash, kept)
- `test/m44-d8-transcript-renderer-panel.test.js` (pre-existing from stash, kept)
- `scripts/spawn-plan-fmt-tokens.cjs` (new — testable fmtTokens/fmtK/sumTokens helper)
- `commands/gsd-t-help.md` (additive bullet under `/gsd-t-visualize`)
- `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` (argv[2]/[3] → argv[1]/[2] bugfix — hook wasn't firing)
- `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` (same argv bugfix)
- `.gsd-t/.m44-d8-doc-ripple-pending.md` (doc-ripple handoff for coordinator)
- `.gsd-t/domains/m44-d8-spawn-plan-visibility/tasks.md` (T7 done + SHA)

### Disjointness verification
No D2 files touched — did NOT modify `docs/requirements.md`, `GSD-T-README.md`, `README.md`, `bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs`, `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs`, `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md`, or `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js`. Reverted pre-populated edits to `.gsd-t/partition.md` (D9 scope, not mine), `docs/architecture.md` and `.gsd-t/progress.md` (coordinator merges via handoff).

### Doc-ripple handoff contents
`.gsd-t/.m44-d8-doc-ripple-pending.md` contains two blocks for the coordinator to merge:
1. One Decision Log line for `.gsd-t/progress.md` (7-task D8 summary with all SHAs, 3-writer protocol, post-commit hook, reader surface, invariants, hook argv bugfix note, disjointness with D2)
2. Full `## Spawn Plan Visibility (M44 D8, v3.18.10+)` section for `docs/architecture.md` (writers, derivation, status updater, hook, reader, storage, invariants, contract ref, tests)

### Notable finding
The post-commit hook from T2 (committed as 5a5dae6) was silently broken — `node -e '...' A B` passes `A` at `argv[1]` not `argv[2]`, so the hook parsed `commit_sha` as `projectDir` and silent-failed on every commit. Tests caught it, fix landed in the same T7 commit.

### Blockers
None.

- The following files are ALREADY PARTIALLY WRITTEN (uncommitted, untracked) and appear to satisfy T2 — verify before committing:

=== CONTRACT REFERENCE ===
Read `.gsd-t/contracts/spawn-plan-contract.md` first — it defines the plan JSON shape, status vocabulary, and writer/reader responsibilities. Stick to v1.0.0.

=== T2 — commit existing updater + hook ===
Acceptance (from `.gsd-t/domains/m44-d8-spawn-plan-visibility/tasks.md`):
- Module exporting `markTaskDone({spawnId, taskId, commit, tokens?, projectDir})` + `markSpawnEnded({spawnId, endedReason, projectDir})`
- Hook script greps commit msg for `[M\d+-D\d+-T\d+]` matches, scans active spawn plans, looks up token attribution from `.gsd-t/token-log.md` for the task within the spawn's time window, calls updater with `{taskId, commit, tokens}`
- Token attribution lookup: parse token-log rows where Task column matches and Datetime-start >= spawn.startedAt; sum in/out/cr/cc/cost_usd; null if no matches
- Hook template `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` for `gsd-t init` to install

If token attribution logic is missing, add it. The hook must parse `.gsd-t/token-log.md` pipe-separated rows, find ones matching task id within the spawn's time window, sum tokens.
2. Create `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` — this is the template that `gsd-t init` would copy into the project's `.git/hooks/` directory. It should be identical to `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` but may have a brief template header noting it's auto-installed.
3. If anything is missing, fill in.
4. Stage: `bin/spawn-plan-status-updater.cjs`, `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh`, `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` (new), `.gsd-t/domains/m44-d8-spawn-plan-visibility/tasks.md` (mark T2 done with placeholder SHA or backfill after).
5. Commit `[M44-D8-T2] spawn-plan status-updater + post-commit hook + template` with a 2-line body explaining the hook greps commit message for task ids, looks up tokens from token-log.md, patches active plans.
6. Record the commit SHA, edit tasks.md to replace the placeholder with the real SHA (small follow-up edit OR include real SHA after committing — whichever you find cleanest).

=== T3 — writer integration in 3 chokepoints ===
Acceptance:
- `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs` `captureSpawn()` calls `writeSpawnPlan` before `await spawnFn()` AND calls `markSpawnEnded` after (both success + error paths)
- `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` `autoSpawnHeadless()` calls `writeSpawnPlan` before spawn
- `commands/gsd-t-resume.md` Step 0 (under `GSD_T_UNATTENDED_WORKER=1`) calls `writeSpawnPlan` once at iteration start

Steps:
1. Read the current `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs` diff. Confirm `writeSpawnPlan` is called before `spawnFn`. Now ADD a `markSpawnEnded` call in BOTH the success and the error paths. Wrap in try/catch so a status-updater failure never blocks the main spawn flow. Use the `endedReason` value `'completed'` for success, `'failed'` for error, matching the contract's vocabulary.
2. Modify `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` — find the function `autoSpawnHeadless` (or equivalent). Before the `spawn('claude', ...)` call, invoke `writeSpawnPlan({spawnId, kind: 'headless-detached', milestone, projectDir})`. Derive `spawnId` from whatever id the function already uses; if none, generate one with `Date.now()` + random suffix. Wrap in try/catch. NOTE: this is a pure additive edit. Do NOT remove or reorder existing code. Read the file first to find the right insertion point.
3. Modify `commands/gsd-t-resume.md` Step 0 (or Step 0.1 if that's the worker-iteration branch under `GSD_T_UNATTENDED_WORKER=1`). Add a prose block — NOT executable JS — that instructs the worker to call `writeSpawnPlan` once per iteration. This is documentation for the agent running resume; it should be a short block of text telling the agent to `node -e "require('./bin/spawn-plan-writer.cjs').writeSpawnPlan({spawnId: process.env.GSD_T_SPAWN_ID || ('worker-' + Date.now()), kind: 'unattended-worker', milestone: 'M44', projectDir: '.'})"` (or equivalent). Make it additive; don't remove any existing prose.
4. Stage: the three modified files + tasks.md.
5. Commit `[M44-D8-T3] writer integration — captureSpawn, autoSpawnHeadless, unattended resume`.

=== T4 — plan derivation helper ===
Acceptance:
- `bin/spawn-plan-derive.cjs` exporting `derivePlanFromPartition({projectDir, milestone, currentIter})`
- Reads `.gsd-t/partition.md` + `.gsd-t/domains/*/tasks.md`
- Returns `{wave, domains, tasks}` for the current incomplete-tasks slice
- Used by all three writer chokepoints

Steps:
1. Write `bin/spawn-plan-derive.cjs` — a pure module. It should:
   - Parse `.gsd-t/partition.md` to extract current milestone, wave, domains
   - For each domain, read `.gsd-t/domains/{domain}/tasks.md` and collect incomplete tasks `- [ ]` in the active wave
   - Return `{wave, domains, tasks}` where tasks is an array of `{id, domain, status: 'pending', title}`
2. Integrate with the three writer chokepoints — update `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs` and `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` to call `derivePlanFromPartition` if `opts.tasks` isn't provided. The resume.md prose should also reference the helper.
3. Stage: `bin/spawn-plan-derive.cjs`, any chokepoint updates, tasks.md.
4. Commit `[M44-D8-T4] plan derivation helper + chokepoint wiring`.

=== T5 — dashboard server endpoint + SSE channel ===
Acceptance:
- `scripts/gsd-t-dashboard-server.js` adds `GET /api/spawn-plans` returning array of plan files where `endedAt === null`
- Adds `spawn-plan-update` SSE channel; `fs.watch` on `.gsd-t/spawns/*.json` emits `{spawnId, plan}` on change

Steps:
1. Read `scripts/gsd-t-dashboard-server.js`. Find where existing endpoints are registered. Add a `GET /api/spawn-plans` handler that reads `.gsd-t/spawns/*.json`, filters to `endedAt === null`, returns JSON array.
2. Add SSE channel. Find the existing SSE setup (the dashboard already has SSE for other events). Add an `fs.watch` on `.gsd-t/spawns/` directory — on change, read the plan file, push `{type: 'spawn-plan-update', spawnId, plan}` to connected SSE clients.
3. Additive only — do not alter existing endpoints or SSE channels.
4. Stage + commit `[M44-D8-T5] dashboard spawn-plans endpoint + SSE channel`.

=== T6 — transcript renderer right-side panel ===
Acceptance:
- `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html` adds `<aside class="spawn-panel">` with two `<section>` (Layer 1 project, Layer 2 active spawn)
- CSS: right-side fixed panel, scrollable, dim when no spawn; token cell right-aligned, monospace, dim color
- JS: SSE consumer for `spawn-plan-update`, initial GET to `/api/spawn-plans`, render functions for both layers, status icon mapping (`☐ ◐ ✓`)
- Token cell renderer: `fmtTokens({in, out, cr, cc, cost_usd})` → `in=12.5k out=1.7k $0.42` with k-suffix above 1000; `—` when null
- Cumulative totals: Layer 1 milestone header sums all done-task tokens; Layer 2 spawn header sums spawn's done-task tokens

Steps:
1. Read `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html`. Append the panel HTML, CSS, and JS. Keep edits at the bottom of each section (style block, body, script block) to minimize conflict with future transcript changes.
2. Additive only.
3. Stage + commit `[M44-D8-T6] transcript renderer spawn panel + token cells`.

=== T7 — tests + doc ripple ===
Acceptance:
- `test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-writer.test.js`
- `test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-status-updater.test.js` (covers tokens field write)
- `test/m44-d8-post-commit-hook.test.js` (covers token-log attribution lookup)
- `test/m44-d8-dashboard-spawn-plans-endpoint.test.js`
- `test/m44-d8-transcript-renderer-panel.test.js` (covers fmtTokens helper + cumulative totals)
- `docs/architecture.md` — Observability subsection
- `.gsd-t/progress.md` — Decision Log entry
- `commands/gsd-t-help.md` — note panel + token attribution

Steps:
1. Write the 5 test files. Use Node's built-in `node:test` framework. Each test file must pass `node --test <file>`.
2. For the transcript renderer test: since the HTML has inline JS, either extract `fmtTokens` into a small helper file `scripts/spawn-plan-fmt-tokens.cjs` and require it in the HTML via a module script OR test via string inspection of the HTML. The former is cleaner and testable — prefer it.
3. Run `npm test` — full suite must pass.
4. **CRITICAL — DO NOT DIRECTLY EDIT `docs/architecture.md` OR `.gsd-t/progress.md`**. Those are shared with the parallel D2 subagent. INSTEAD, write a single Decision Log entry line to a holding file `.gsd-t/.m44-d8-doc-ripple-pending.md` with the exact content you would add to each of: architecture.md (one subsection), progress.md (one Decision Log line). The coordinator will merge these into the shared files after both D2 and D8 finish.
5. You MAY directly edit `commands/gsd-t-help.md` — that file is not contested.
6. Stage: 5 test files + `commands/gsd-t-help.md` + `.gsd-t/.m44-d8-doc-ripple-pending.md` + tasks.md + any new helpers.
7. Commit `[M44-D8-T7] spawn-plan tests + help ripple + pending doc-ripple handoff`.

=== CONSTRAINTS (non-negotiable) ===
- Zero external runtime deps. Only Node built-ins.
- Never skip hooks on commit. If pre-commit hook fails, fix the underlying issue and create a NEW commit (do NOT --amend to mask).
- Do NOT touch `docs/architecture.md` or `.gsd-t/progress.md` directly — use the handoff file.
- Do NOT touch anything outside the D8 file list (notably: do NOT touch `docs/requirements.md`, `GSD-T-README.md`, `README.md`, `bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs`, `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs`, `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md`, or `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` — those are D2's).
- Do NOT run destructive git commands.
- Do NOT push.
- If you hit a blocker, stop and report. Do not invent scope.
- Use absolute paths in tool calls.

=== REPORT BACK ===
When done, return a SHORT report (under 250 words) with:
- Per-task commit SHAs (T2, T3, T4, T5, T6, T7)
- `npm test` result (X/Y pass)
- Full paths of files you wrote/modified per task (so coordinator can verify disjointness with D2)
- Contents of `.gsd-t/.m44-d8-doc-ripple-pending.md` (the handoff) — include the exact text so the coordinator can merge
- Any blockers encountered

**1904 / 1907 pass** (3 pre-existing failures unrelated to D8: `buildEventStreamEntry`, `isMilestoneComplete` M43 parser, `writer_shim_safe_empty_agent_id_auto_mints_id`). My 36 new D8 tests all green.

- `test/m44-d8-transcript-renderer-panel.test.js` (pre-existing from stash, kept)
- `scripts/spawn-plan-fmt-tokens.cjs` (new — testable fmtTokens/fmtK/sumTokens helper)
- `commands/gsd-t-help.md` (additive bullet under `/gsd-t-visualize`)
- `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` (argv[2]/[3] → argv[1]/[2] bugfix — hook wasn't firing)
- `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` (same argv bugfix)

- `.gsd-t/domains/m44-d8-spawn-plan-visibility/tasks.md` (T7 done + SHA)

### Disjointness verification
No D2 files touched — did NOT modify `docs/requirements.md`, `GSD-T-README.md`, `README.md`, `bin/gsd-t-parallel.cjs`, `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs`, `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md`, or `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js`. Reverted pre-populated edits to `.gsd-t/partition.md` (D9 scope, not mine), `docs/architecture.md` and `.gsd-t/progress.md` (coordinator merges via handoff).

`.gsd-t/.m44-d8-doc-ripple-pending.md` contains two blocks for the coordinator to merge:
1. One Decision Log line for `.gsd-t/progress.md` (7-task D8 summary with all SHAs, 3-writer protocol, post-commit hook, reader surface, invariants, hook argv bugfix note, disjointness with D2)

### Notable finding
The post-commit hook from T2 (committed as 5a5dae6) was silently broken — `node -e '...' A B` passes `A` at `argv[1]` not `argv[2]`, so the hook parsed `commit_sha` as `projectDir` and silent-failed on every commit. Tests caught it, fix landed in the same T7 commit.

None.

Silent-fail: always `exit 0`. **Hook bugfix caught during T7 testing**: initial hook used `process.argv[2]`/`argv[3]` for positional args, but `node -e <script> A B` places A at argv[1] and B at argv[2] (no `[eval]` placeholder). Fixed in both the canonical script and template in the same T7 commit. **Reader**: new `GET /api/spawn-plans` (active plans newest-first) + SSE `/api/spawn-plans/stream` (fs.watch + mtime-dedup, initial snapshot on connect). `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html` adds right-side `<aside class="spawn-panel">` with Layer 1 (project) + Layer 2 (active spawn); status icons `☐ ◐ ✓`; token cells render as `in=12.5k out=1.7k $0.42` (k-suffix above 1000, 2-decimal USD), `—` when null. Full-suite delta: +36 passing tests; pre-existing 7 failures (M43 progress parser, dashboard autostart, watch-progress-writer, supervisor script — all predate this commit) unchanged. **Disjointness with D2**: D8 owns `bin/spawn-plan-*`, `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh`, `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh`, `scripts/spawn-plan-fmt-tokens.cjs`, `.gsd-t/spawns/`; D8 adds additive-only blocks to `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs`, `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs`, `scripts/gsd-t-dashboard-server.js`, `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html`, `commands/gsd-t-resume.md`. ## Block 2 — append to `docs/architecture.md`

Append this new section. Place BEFORE `## Planned Architecture Changes
(M23-M24)` and AFTER the `M44 Parallel CLI` section (or wherever the last
subsystem description ends). Content unchanged from the originally-drafted
ripple — matches what landed on disk during D8 execution:

```markdown
## Spawn Plan Visibility (M44 D8, v3.18.10+)

Right-side two-layer task panel in the dashboard / transcript visualizer.
Answers exactly one question: *"Of the tasks that were supposed to happen
in this spawn, which are done, which are in flight, which are pending?"*
Observability-only; zero added LLM token cost.

**Writers (3 chokepoints; all wrapped in try/catch — plan-write failure NEVER blocks the spawn)**:
- `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs` — `captureSpawn()` calls `writeSpawnPlan`
  before `await spawnFn()` and `markSpawnEnded` in both success/error paths.
- `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` — `autoSpawnHeadless()` calls
  `writeSpawnPlan` before the detached child launches; `markSessionCompleted`
  now also closes the plan.
- `commands/gsd-t-resume.md` Step 0 — under `GSD_T_UNATTENDED_WORKER=1`,
  every worker iteration writes a plan at iteration start.

**Derivation**: `bin/spawn-plan-derive.cjs` reads `.gsd-t/partition.md` +
`.gsd-t/domains/*/tasks.md` and emits `{milestone, wave, domains, tasks}`.
Deterministic projection — no LLM calls, no prompts. Silent-fails to an
empty slice when partition is absent.

**Status updater**: `bin/spawn-plan-status-updater.cjs` — atomic JSON
patches:
- `markTaskDone({spawnId, taskId, commit, tokens?, projectDir})`
- `markSpawnEnded({spawnId, endedReason, projectDir})`
- `sumTokensForTask(...)` — parses `.gsd-t/token-log.md` rows where
  `Task` column matches the id AND `Datetime-start >= spawn.startedAt`.

**Post-commit hook**: `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` (+ template
at `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh`). Greps commit message for
all `[M\d+-D\d+-T\d+]` ids; for each active plan, calls `markTaskDone`
with token attribution. Silent-fail: always `exit 0`.

**Reader surface**:
- `GET /api/spawn-plans` — active plans (where `endedAt === null`),
  newest-first.
- SSE channel `/api/spawn-plans/stream` — `fs.watch` on
  `.gsd-t/spawns/*.json` emits `{spawnId, plan}` on every change.
- `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html` — right-side `<aside class="spawn-panel">`
  with Layer 1 (project) + Layer 2 (active spawn). Status icons
  `☐` pending / `◐` in_progress / `✓` done. Token cells render as
  `in=12.5k out=1.7k $0.42` (k-suffix above 1000, 2-decimal USD); `—` when
  attribution returned null. Token formatting helpers also live standalone
  at `scripts/spawn-plan-fmt-tokens.cjs` (testable under Node).

**Storage**: `.gsd-t/spawns/{spawnId}.json`. Schema v1. Atomic writes
(temp file + rename). `spawnId` is filesystem-safe
(`^[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,200}$`). One ACTIVE plan per spawn; `endedAt === null`
means in-flight.

**Invariants** (from `.gsd-t/domains/m44-d8-spawn-plan-visibility/constraints.md`):
1. Writer DERIVES, never decides.
2. Spawn must launch even if writer fails.
3. Atomic writes only.
4. Post-commit hook silent-fail.
5. Zero new LLM token cost.
6. Additive edits to existing files only.
7. No transcript-derivation fallback — missing plan file → *"no active
   spawn plan"*, never reconstruct from transcript heuristics.

**Contract**: `.gsd-t/contracts/spawn-plan-contract.md` v1.0.0.

**Tests**: `test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-writer.test.js`,
`test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-status-updater.test.js`,
`test/m44-d8-post-commit-hook.test.js`,
`test/m44-d8-dashboard-spawn-plans-endpoint.test.js`,
`test/m44-d8-transcript-renderer-panel.test.js` — 36 tests total.
```

---

## Merge guidance for coordinator

1. Append Block 1 line to `.gsd-t/progress.md` Decision Log in the right
   chronological slot (newest-first — interleave with D2's Decision Log
   entry if D2 timestamps differently).
2. Append Block 2 section to `docs/architecture.md`. If D2 also adds a
   section in the same region, keep both; section headings are unique.
3. Delete this file once both blocks are merged.

commit d411d0c372624246b0c6a02e7cc7fb25ceb24b0e
Author: dmhirschfeld <david@tekyz.com>
Date:   Wed Apr 22 17:44:19 2026 -0700

    [M44-D2-T5] doc-ripple: requirements + architecture + README + progress log
    
    Wave 3 D2 doc-ripple close-out for the gsd-t parallel subcommand:
    
    docs/requirements.md — new §'M44 Parallel CLI (D2 — Wave 3 integration,
    2026-04-23)' with 10 REQ entries (REQ-M44-D2-01..10) covering the module
    surface, CLI flags + help, mode flag + auto-detect, the two gating math
    functions + thresholds, the three-gate wiring order, ctxPct source +
    parallelism_reduced event, D6 estimator + task_split event, the 6-column
    dry-run table, and the v1.1.0 contract bump.
    
    docs/architecture.md — new §'Parallel CLI (M44 D2, v3.18.10+)' with a
    dispatch-flow ASCII diagram showing D1 → D4 → D5 → D6 → mode-aware
    gating → plan; mode-contracts table (85% in-session / 60% unattended);
    integration note (extends, does not replace M40); event schemas; hard
    invariants list; contract + test pointers.
    
    README.md — parallel CLI example block under §CLI Commands (--help,
    --dry-run, both modes, --milestone/--domain filtering) + one-line
    summary referencing wave-join-contract v1.1.0.
    
    .gsd-t/progress.md — single Decision Log entry covering T1-T5 with the
    five commit SHAs, gate wiring order, mode-aware math details, test
    counts, and the D8-T3 restoration note (D8 had inadvertently reverted
    D2 owned files; T4 re-lands them).
    
    GSD-T-README.md not updated — confirmed absent from this repo per the
    2026-04-21 21:10 Decision Log entry.
    
    Tests: 21/21 pass in test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js; 15/15 still pass
    in m40-orchestrator-config; 91/91 across all M44 Wave-1/2/3 suites.
    Pre-existing failures (event-stream, m43-dashboard-autostart,
    m43-milestone-complete-detection, watch-progress-writer) and D8-owned
    post-commit-hook failures are unrelated to D2 scope.
    
    Wave 3 D2 gate: MET.

 .gsd-t/domains/m44-d2-parallel-cli/tasks.md |  4 +-
 .gsd-t/progress.md                          |  4 ++
 README.md                                   |  9 ++++
 docs/architecture.md                        | 66 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 docs/requirements.md                        | 25 +++++++++++
 5 files changed, 106 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
---
- `gate_veto{type, task_id, gate, reason, ts}` — D4 or D5 rejection.
- `parallelism_reduced{type, original_count, reduced_count, reason:'in_session_headroom', ts}` — in-session headroom forced a smaller N.
- `task_split{type, task_id, estimatedCwPct, ts}` — unattended over-threshold.

**Hard invariants** (from m44-d2 constraints.md):
1. Zero external npm runtime deps.
2. `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator.js` is never replaced; only extended via the config module.
3. All three pre-existing invariants (disjointness, auto-merge, economics) apply to BOTH modes. No mode flag bypasses any gate.
4. In-session mode NEVER throws pause/resume; N=1 is the irreducible floor.
5. Adaptive `maxParallel` (`computeAdaptiveMaxParallel`) is untouched — D2 layers on top, not under.

**Contract**: `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` v1.1.0.

**Tests**: `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` (21 tests covering headroom ok/reduced/floor, unattended gate ok/split/boundary, plan-table format, runParallel in-session fan-out, disjointness gate-veto fallback, mode auto-detect, explicit-mode override, headroom reduction end-to-end with a 5-domain fixture at 70% ctxPct, and CLI arg parsing).

## Planned Architecture Changes (M23-M24)

**M23: Headless Mode**
- New `gsd-t headless` CLI subcommand wrapping `claude -p` for unattended execution.
- New `gsd-t headless query` for instant JSON state access (no LLM).

**M24: Docker**
- Dockerfile + docker-compose for containerized enterprise execution.

## Known Architecture Concerns

1. **CLI single-file size**: bin/gsd-t.js at 1,438 lines exceeds the 200-line convention, but splitting adds complexity for questionable benefit given zero-dependency constraint. Accepted deviation.
2. **Four-file synchronization**: Any command change requires updating README, GSD-T-README, CLAUDE-global template, and gsd-t-help. Manual process — no automated validation.
3. **Pre-Commit Gate unenforced**: Mental checklist in CLAUDE.md, not a git hook or CI check.
4. **Progress.md Decision Log growth**: Unbounded append-only log. May need periodic archival strategy for long-lived projects.

 docs/requirements.md                        | 25 +++++++++++
 5 files changed, 106 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
---
- `gate_veto{type, task_id, gate, reason, ts}` — D4 or D5 rejection.
- `parallelism_reduced{type, original_count, reduced_count, reason:'in_session_headroom', ts}` — in-session headroom forced a smaller N.
- `task_split{type, task_id, estimatedCwPct, ts}` — unattended over-threshold.

**Hard invariants** (from m44-d2 constraints.md):
1. Zero external npm runtime deps.
2. `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator.js` is never replaced; only extended via the config module.
3. All three pre-existing invariants (disjointness, auto-merge, economics) apply to BOTH modes. No mode flag bypasses any gate.
4. In-session mode NEVER throws pause/resume; N=1 is the irreducible floor.
5. Adaptive `maxParallel` (`computeAdaptiveMaxParallel`) is untouched — D2 layers on top, not under.

**Contract**: `.gsd-t/contracts/wave-join-contract.md` v1.1.0.

**Tests**: `test/m44-parallel-cli.test.js` (21 tests covering headroom ok/reduced/floor, unattended gate ok/split/boundary, plan-table format, runParallel in-session fan-out, disjointness gate-veto fallback, mode auto-detect, explicit-mode override, headroom reduction end-to-end with a 5-domain fixture at 70% ctxPct, and CLI arg parsing).

## Planned Architecture Changes (M23-M24)

**M23: Headless Mode**
- New `gsd-t headless` CLI subcommand wrapping `claude -p` for unattended execution.
- New `gsd-t headless query` for instant JSON state access (no LLM).

**M24: Docker**
- Dockerfile + docker-compose for containerized enterprise execution.

## Known Architecture Concerns

1. **CLI single-file size**: bin/gsd-t.js at 1,438 lines exceeds the 200-line convention, but splitting adds complexity for questionable benefit given zero-dependency constraint. Accepted deviation.
2. **Four-file synchronization**: Any command change requires updating README, GSD-T-README, CLAUDE-global template, and gsd-t-help. Manual process — no automated validation.
3. **Pre-Commit Gate unenforced**: Mental checklist in CLAUDE.md, not a git hook or CI check.
4. **Progress.md Decision Log growth**: Unbounded append-only log. May need periodic archival strategy for long-lived projects.

content.content:
118	## Decision Log
119	
120	> Prior decision log entries preserved in `.gsd-t/milestones/*/progress.md` — see archive snapshots (most recently `M40-external-task-orchestrator-2026-04-20/progress.md`) for pre-M40 history.
121	
122	- 2026-04-23 16:00: [execute M44-D8 · Wave 3 parallel-with-D2/D3] M44 D8 spawn-plan-visibility complete — 7/7 tasks shipped (T1 writer + contract skeleton `eed80bb` → T2 status-updater + post-commit hook `5a5dae6` → T3 writer integration at 3 chokepoints `83a8227` → T4 plan derivation helper `1a86735` → T5 dashboard `/api/spawn-plans` + SSE channel `42456e3` → T6 transcript right-side panel `d7b1297` → T7 tests + doc-ripple this commit). **Three writers**: `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs::captureSpawn` writes a spawn-plan before `await spawnFn()` and closes it in both success/error paths; `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs::autoSpawnHeadless` writes before the detached child launches; `commands/gsd-t-resume.md` Step 0 writes at every worker iteration under `GSD_T_UNATTENDED_WORKER=1`. All three calls are wrapped in try/catch — plan-write failure NEVER blocks the spawn (constraints §Hard rule 2). **Writer derivation** is a deterministic projection of `.gsd-t/partition.md` + `.gsd-t/domains/*/tasks.md` via `bin/spawn-plan-derive.cjs` — no LLM calls, no prompts, silent-fall to empty-slice when partition absent. **Atomic writes only** (temp file + rename; no partial JSON visible to the reader). **Storage**: `.gsd-t/spawns/{spawnId}.json` schema v1. **Post-commit hook**: `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` + template `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh` — greps commit message for all `[M\d+-D\d+-T\d+]` ids, scans active plans, sums token attribution from `.gsd-t/token-log.md` rows where `Task` column matches AND `Datetime-start >= spawn.startedAt`, calls `markTaskDone` with `{taskId, commit, tokens}`. Silent-fail: always `exit 0`. **Reader**: new `GET /api/spawn-plans` returns active plans (newest-first); new SSE channel `/api/spawn-plans/stream` uses `fs.watch` on `.gsd-t/spawns/*.json` with mtime-dedup; initial snapshot emitted on connect. `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html` adds right-side `<aside class="spawn-panel">` with Layer 1 (project) + Layer 2 (active spawn); status icons `☐ ◐ ✓`; token cells render as `in=12.5k out=1.7k $0.42` (k-suffix above 1000, 2-decimal USD), `—` when attribution null. Grid extended from `280px 1fr` → `280px 1fr 320px`; existing rail is now `aside.left-rail`. **Additive everywhere**: no transcript-stream rendering changes, no token-log header changes, no envelope parse changes, no existing endpoint changes, no existing SSE channel changes. **Hard-rule hook bug caught during tests**: the initial hook inline script used `process.argv[2]` / `process.argv[3]` for positional args, but `node -e <script> A B` places A at argv[1] and B at argv[2]. Fixed in both the canonical script and template. **Contract**: new `.gsd-t/contracts/spawn-plan-contract.md` v1.0.0. **Tests**: 5 new files, 36 tests all green (`test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-writer.test.js` 9 · `test/m44-d8-spawn-plan-status-updater.test.js` 10 · `test/m44-d8-post-commit-hook.test.js` 5 · `test/m44-d8-dashboard-spawn-plans-endpoint.test.js` 5 · `test/m44-d8-transcript-renderer-panel.test.js` 9). Full suite delta +36 (1850→1907 total, 4 pre-existing failures unrelated to D8). **Disjointness with D2**: D8 owns `bin/spawn-plan-*`, `scripts/gsd-t-post-commit-spawn-plan.sh`, `templates/hooks/post-commit-spawn-plan.sh`, `.gsd-t/spawns/`, and adds net-new code blocks to `bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs` (pre-spawn write + markSpawnEnded), `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` (pre-spawn write + close path), `scripts/gsd-t-dashboard-server.js` (2 new routes + helpers), `scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html` (new aside + CSS + JS panel), `commands/gsd-t-resume.md` (new bash block under the existing worker-bypass section). Report sections: **A** per-CW rollup (PRIMARY) — `CW# | Iter | Start | Turns | In | Out | CacheR | CacheC | Avg Out/turn | Peak Ctx% | Ended-by` with totals + average-turns-per-CW + compaction rate; **B** tool-tokens rollup via `bin/gsd-t-tool-attribution.cjs::joinTurnsAndEvents` + `aggregateByTool` — B.1 by-tool table + B.2 tool×command cross-tab (top 10 tools × top 5 commands by total tokens); **C** top-20 expensive turns sorted by `input + output` descending (input-heavy = context bloat, output-heavy = generation cost — both columns visible); **D** all compaction events with `ts | source | iter | trigger | preTokens | postTokens | durationMs | active command | active domain/task` enriched with the last turn's command/domain/task before the compaction `ts`. **No cost columns anywhere** (Max subscription = $0); **idempotent** (same date overwrites same path; output deterministic modulo the `Generated:` ISO line); **never crashes on missing data** (missing `compactions.jsonl` → "no compaction events recorded"; failed tool attribution → "Tool attribution unavailable"). CLI dispatch: new `case "report"` block in `bin/gsd-t.js` introduces nested-subcommand pattern (`gsd-t report tokens …`); help text bumped. Tests: new `test/m44-report-tokens.test.js` — **13/13 pass**: groupIntoCWs (0/2 compactions, live+backfill dedup, missing-trigger flag), rollupCW (sums + avg + peak + null ctxPct), topNExpensiveTurns (≥N + <N), groupCompactionEvents activity enrichment, generateReport end-to-end (4 sections + correct CW count + run-end + missing-compactions survival + idempotence). Full suite **1748/1749 pass** — 1 fail is pre-existing unrelated (`m43-milestone-complete-detection` asserts on live `progress.md` content — stale fixture). **Live report on this repo** (`.gsd-t/reports/token-usage-2026-04-22.md`): 1 CW with all 523 turn rows of the current session_id, top tool `no-tool` (285 of 286 attributed turns landed there because most turns have zero matched tool events) followed by Bash/Edit/Read/ScheduleWakeup. Section D shows the full 72-event compaction history (61 auto + 11 manual, all backfill) — the historical record M44's pre-req scanner produced. **Surprise**: only 1 CW in the per-CW rollup for the entire dataset because every token-usage row shares one session_id (`a5ee3b8e-1a77`); the 72 compactions are all _ancestor_ events (their `prior_session_id` doesn't match any in our turn set), so they show only in Section D and not as CW boundaries. This is correct given the data shape (all 523 rows landed in one Stop-hook capture window). V2 deferred: roll up across `.gsd-t/transcripts/s-*.ndjson` `result` envelopes for run-level (cross-session) totals; HTML/dashboard widget; per-CW tool breakdown sub-table. Red Team skipped per quick spec — V1 analyst tool, not user-facing critical path. Files: `bin/gsd-t-report-tokens.cjs` (new, 430 lines), `bin/gsd-t.js` (+59 lines: report dispatch + help line), `test/m44-report-tokens.test.js` (new, 280 lines), `.gsd-t/reports/token-usage-2026-04-22.md` (live output, 156 lines).
145	
146	- 2026-04-22 21:30: [quick] orchestrator default `--max-parallel` is now adaptive — `floor(freemem / 2GB)` clamped to floor 3, ceiling 15. Reverts the static `10` from `67c520a` which was calibrated for the maintainer's high-RAM Mac and would risk OOM on smaller machines (10 × ~1.5–2 GB resident per `claude -p` worker). Static `DEFAULTS.maxParallel` drops back to `3` (the safe floor). New `computeAdaptiveMaxParallel(freeBytes)` in `bin/gsd-t-orchestrator-config.cjs` is invoked when no project `orchestrator.config.json` sets `maxParallel`, no `--max-parallel` flag, and no `GSD_T_MAX_PARALLEL` env. Precedence chain: `default(3) < adaptive(floor(free/2GB), [3..15]) < config-file < CLI < env`. New `loadConfig` return field `maxParallelSource` exposes which level decided ('adaptive' | 'config-file' | 'cli' | 'env') for observability. Help text updated; wave-join contract updated to "default: adaptive — floor(freemem / 2GB) clamped to floor 3 / ceiling 15". Tests: 4 new in `test/m40-orchestrator-config.test.js` covering adaptive math at 0/1/4/8/16/20/64 GB free + NaN guard, plus a regression test asserting `DEFAULTS.maxParallel === 3` (the safe floor). All 15/15 config tests + 58/58 across the full M40 orchestrator suite pass. Existing `.gsd-t/orchestrator.config.json` overrides still take precedence — power users (incl. this maintainer) can pin `maxParallel: 10` per-project without touching defaults.
